changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_log_disassociability_configured to k8s_audit_log_disassociability_ensured for clarity
review_notes: The functions are mostly well-named and map accurately to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. The change made to 'k8s_audit_log_disassociability_configured' improves clarity by using 'ensured' to indicate a clear pass/fail condition. The functions align with the control's focus on audit logging and disassociability.
naming_improvements: Use 'ensured' instead of 'configured' for clearer pass/fail indication in k8s_audit_log_disassociability_ensured
title: Cross-Organizational Audit Logging - Cross - organizational auditing | disassociability implement [ assignment
step1_reasoning: The control AU-16(3) focuses on cross-organizational audit logging with an emphasis on disassociability. In Kubernetes, audit logging can be configured to capture detailed logs of API requests, which can be used for cross-organizational auditing. Ensuring that audit logs are enabled, retained appropriately, and capture necessary metadata aligns with the control's intent. Additionally, configuring audit logs to support disassociability (e.g., by ensuring logs do not directly link to specific users without additional context) can be part of the audit policy configuration.
